title: cyperorchis wilsonii
intro: Cyperorchis wilsonii, also known as the Wilson's cyperorchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperorchis wilsonii include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Cyperorchis wilsonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
